chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنْ بَدَأَ بِالسَّعْيِ قَبْلَ الطَّوَافِ أَوْ طَافَ وَ أَخَّرَ السَّعْيَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 135 – One who begins with the Sa’ee before the Tawaaf, or performs Tawaaf and delays the Sa’ee

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/47)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/47)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يَطُوفُ بِالْبَيْتِ فَيَدْخُلُ وَقْتُ الْعَصْرِ أَ يَسْعَى قَبْلَ أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ أَوْ يُصَلِّي قَبْلَ أَنْ يَسْعَى قَالَ لَا بَلْ يُصَلِّي ثُمَّ يَسْعَى .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Fazalat Bin Ayoub, from Rafa’at who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullahasws about the man who performs Tawaaf by the House (Kaaba), so the time for Al-Asr (Prayer) enters. Should he perform Sa’ee before he Prays, or should he Pray before he performs Sa’ee?’ Heasws said: ‘No, but he should Pray, then perform Sa’ee’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ahmad ibn Muhammad from has narrated from al-ffusayn ibn Sa‘id from Fadalah ibn Ayyub from Rifa’ah who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who performs Tawaf around the House and it becomes time of al-‘Asr; if he must perform Salat (prayer) first or Sa‘iy. He (the Imam) said, ‘No, he must perform Salat (prayer) first.’”
